prompt: Give me a short pep talk before I start a hard task I have been putting off all morning.
response: You've got this! You've been putting it off, but that means you've been building up to it all morning. You're ready. Take a deep breath, focus on the task at hand, and just get started. The hardest part is often just taking that first step. Once you do, you'll gain momentum and be able to power through. You're capable and strong, and you can do this. Go crush it!
